{{Quote|What about Iridik'k-stallu? Her hearts are in the right place.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (novelization)">[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]]</ref>}}
'''Iridik'k-stallu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. She had multiple [[Heart/Legends|hearts]], and supported [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa's]] and [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma's]] efforts to limit [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] powers.

{{Char-stub}}
